name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Western Union offers international money transfers, online and in-person, with competitive exchange rates and promotional fee waivers for new customers.
description_long:
Western Union is a global money transfer service that has operated for decades as a primary remittance and funds transfer provider. The company enables customers to send and receive money internationally from the United States to over 200 countries and territories. Their service model combines both digital online transfers and physical agent locations for in-person transactions.

Western Union's core offerings include online money transfers with real-time exchange rate quotes, variable fee structures ranging from $1.99 to $0.00 USD depending on transfer method and destination, and promotional incentives for new users including zero-fee first transfers. The platform displays live foreign exchange rates (as shown in their USD-to-MXN example: 1.00 USD = 16.9486 to 17.6326 MXN) and allows customers to select from dozens of destination currencies and countries. They support transfers to major remittance corridors including Mexico, Guatemala, Philippines, India, Colombia, and numerous other nations across Africa, Asia, Europe, and the Caribbean.

Western Union differentiates itself through its extensive global network reach, established brand recognition in international money transfer markets, and competitive promotional rates for new customers. The platform provides transparent fee disclosure upfront and allows senders to see exactly what receivers will obtain before completing transfers. Their multi-currency support and real-time rate quoting make them accessible for various international payment needs.

However, Western Union's standard fees (from $1.99 USD) apply to most transfers after promotional periods end, and exchange rates include a markup over interbank rates. The service is best suited for customers already familiar with Western Union or those needing to send money to countries where Western Union maintains strong agent networks, rather than consumers primarily seeking the lowest-cost transfer option.
pros: Zero-fee promotion on first international online transfer for new registered users
Transparent fee structure displayed upfront ($1.99 to $0.00 USD range shown on interface)
Real-time exchange rate quotes visible before sending (e.g., USD-to-MXN rates updated live)
Extensive global reach with 200+ countries and territories supported
Multi-currency support across major remittance corridors (MXN, GTQ, PHP, INR, COP, etc.)
Online registration available for better exchange rates compared to walk-in transfers
Clear receiver amount calculation shown before transaction completion
cons: Standard fees of $1.99+ USD apply after first promotional transfer expires
Exchange rates include markups above interbank rates, increasing transfer costs
No transparent disclosure of exact markup percentages or fee schedules on homepage
Service temporarily unavailable for certain payment methods (Orange wallet noted as unavailable)
Website does not clearly explain fee structures for different transaction types or corridors
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates sending remittances to family in Mexico, Philippines, India, or Central America
New customers taking advantage of zero-fee first transfer promotions
Individuals needing to send money to countries where Western Union has extensive agent networks
Senders who value brand recognition and established trust in international transfers
diagnosis: Western Union is best for individuals sending remittances internationally, particularly to countries in Latin America, Asia, and the Caribbean, who value established brand recognition and extensive agent networks. The main caveat is that standard fees ($1.99+) and exchange rate markups apply after promotional periods, making comparison shopping with alternative transfer services advisable for cost-conscious customers.
services: Online international money transfers from the United States
Real-time exchange rate quotes and comparisons
Money transfer to Philippines (PHP and USD)
Transfers to Dominican Republic (DOP and USD)
Global transfers to 200+ countries and territories
User account registration for improved exchange rates
Promotional zero-fee transfers for new customers

places_enrichment.adr_format_address: 300 Grant Ave, Millvale, PA 15209, USA
